creator: aksyom@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 161200
banshee console output

multimedia/banshee was installed with: pkg install banshee

Displays main UI, runs for a few seconds and crashes.

Attached is the program output.

It seems Banshee cannot connect with DBus or some DBus dependent subsystem, even though DBus was enabled and running.

I already tried enabling and starting Avahi, but that did not help.

My computer uses nothing but plain X.org and i3 window manager.
